message:
feat(cli): expand Config subcommand with --show, --paths, --json flags

- Refactor Commands::Config from unit variant to struct variant with
  three optional flags: --show (print config summary as text),
  --paths (print path and precedence details), --json (print config
  as JSON) — enables non-interactive config inspection for scripts
  and CI pipelines
- Update handle_config() signature to accept the new flags and make
  it async to support package manager path resolution
- Add imports for PackageManager resolution types (ResolvedPaths,
  ResolvedResource, ResourceOrigin), SettingsScope, Serialize,
  serde_json, and bubbletea TUI types needed by the expanded handler
- Move Config handler from ultra-fast sync path to async subcommand
  path since --show/--json may need package resolution
- Update CLI parser tests: replace simple pattern match with
  exhaustive field assertions for all three flags (4 test cases)
- Update conformance fixture_runner to match Config { .. } instead
  of Config unit variant

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
